ddls:
CREATE TABLE "areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area */,
  "area_code" TEXT /* Code representing the area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area */,
  "area_type" TEXT /* Type of area (e.g., country, region) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the area */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the area */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the area */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the area's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case entry */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the area for which cases are reported */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the reported cases */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new cases reported on the given date */,
  "new_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of new deaths reported on the given date */,
  "new_recoveries" INTEGER /* Number of new recoveries reported on the given date */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Cumulative number of cases reported by this date */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Cumulative number of deaths reported by this date */,
  "total_recoveries" INTEGER /* Cumulative number of recoveries reported by this date */,
  "test_count" INTEGER /* Number of tests conducted on the given date */,
  "test_positive_rate" REAL /* Positive rate of tests conducted on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_cases_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination entry */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the area for which vaccination data is reported */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the reported vaccination count */,
  "vaccination_count" INTEGER /* Number of vaccinations administered on the given date */,
  "first_dose_count" INTEGER /* Number of first doses administered on the given date */,
  "second_dose_count" INTEGER /* Number of second doses administered on the given date */,
  "booster_count" INTEGER /* Number of booster doses administered on the given date */,
  "vaccination_coverage" REAL /* Percentage of the population vaccinated */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Rate of vaccination (e.g., doses per 100 people) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the area for which demographics are reported */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the area */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Age distribution data in JSON format */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Gender distribution data in JSON format */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "average_household_size" REAL /* Average household size */,
  "urban_population_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population living in urban areas */,
  "rural_population_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population living in rural areas */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_metadata" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the area covered by the report */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, HTML) */,
  "report_duration" TEXT /* Duration covered by the report (e.g., 'daily', 'weekly', 'monthly') */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., 'draft', 'published', 'archived') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_metadata_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging in */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, researcher) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for user contact */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for user contact */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., 'active', 'inactive', 'suspended') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., 'view report', 'download data') */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the area related to the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was issued */,
  "message" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., 'case increase', 'vaccination decrease') */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., 'low', 'medium', 'high') */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., 'active', 'resolved') */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alert */,
  "alert_source" TEXT /* Source of the alert (e.g., 'system', 'user') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_cases" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical case entry */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the area for which historical data is reported */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the reported cases */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Cumulative number of cases reported by this date */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Cumulative number of deaths reported by this date */,
  "total_recoveries" INTEGER /* Cumulative number of recoveries reported by this date */,
  "test_count" INTEGER /* Cumulative number of tests conducted by this date */,
  "test_positive_rate" REAL /* Positive rate of tests conducted by this date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_cases_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend entry */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the area for which the trend is reported */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date of the trend observation */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Value of the trend (e.g., case growth rate) */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., 'case growth', 'death rate', 'recovery rate') */,
  "trend_source" TEXT /* Source of the trend data (e.g., 'daily_cases', 'historical_cases') */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)
